name: Amori
description: Amori is the oldest of the Amori Brothers and examinee #197 in the 287th Hunter Exam. He always wears a tuque and a polo neck sweater.   ~! One year later, Amori and his brothers attend the 288th Hunter Exam, confident that they will pass, only to be easily knocked unconscious together with the other applicants in the First Phase by Killua. Seeing the huge gap in abilities between him and themselves, they decide to never take the Hunter Exam again.!~
